chapter_title.ar: باب التِّجَارَةِ فِي مَالِ الْيَتِيمِ وَ الْقَرْضِ مِنْهُ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 45 – The trading regarding the wealth of the orphans and the borrowing from it

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (19/100)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (19/100)
text: قُلْتُ لَهُ رَجُلٌ وُلِّيَ مَالَ يَتِيمٍ أَ يَسْتَقْرِضُ مِنْهُ قَالَ . كَانَ عَلِيُّ بْنُ الْحُسَيْنِ ( عليه السلام ) يَسْتَقْرِضُ مِنْ مَالِ يَتِيمٍ كَانَ فِي حَجْرِهِ .

en.hubeali: Al Husayn Bin Muhammad, from Moala Bin Muhammad, from Al Hassan Bin Ali, from Aban Bin Usman, from Mansour Bin Hazim,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup>, said, ‘I said to him<sup>asws</sup>, ‘A man governs the wealth of an orphan, can he borrow from it?’ He<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘Ali<sup>asws</sup> Bin Al-Husayn<sup>asws</sup> did borrow from the wealth of an orphan who was in his<sup>asws</sup> lap (care)’.
en.sarwar: 6. Al-Husayn from Muhammad has narrated from Mu’alla’ ibn Muhammad from al-Hassan ibn Ali from Aban ibn ‘Uthman from Mansur ibn Hazim who has said the following: “This is concerning my question before abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, about the case of a man who is the person in charge of the assets of orphans; if he can borrow from such assets. He (the Imam) said, ‘Ali ibn al-Husayn, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, would borrow from the assets of orphans under his guardianship.’”
